fields.acceptance_criteria: ticket serve starts without any token; all read endpoints (GET /api/*) work unauthenticated; write/mutating endpoints remain protected when a token IS provided; --no-auth flag or absence of token triggers anonymous mode; existing token-authenticated behaviour unchanged
fields.title: Impl: make auth optional in ticket serve — anonymous read-only mode

fields.acceptance_criteria: ticket serve starts with no token args; GET /api/* works with no Authorization header; healthz drops auth fields; AuthState kept for future agent API use; existing tests pass
fields.title: Impl: remove inbound HTTP auth from ticket serve
